headline: Is Now The Time To Reassess Southwest Airlines (LUV) After Its Strong 1 Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Southwest Airlines at around US$39.56 is still offering value after a strong run, this article walks through what the current price actually reflects. The stock has returned 5.2% over the last 7 days and 2.1% over the past month, while the 1 year return stands at 54.1% and the 5 year return at a 31.6% decline, giving a mixed picture for anyone thinking about the next move. Recent headlines around Southwest often focus on its operational reliability, network...

headline: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Valuation Check As Route Changes And Fee Moves Target Profitability
summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) is reshaping its route map and fees as fuel and inflation pressures bite, trimming Chicago O’Hare service while adding Santa Rosa flights and adjusting bag charges to support profitability. See our latest analysis for Southwest Airlines. The recent route reshuffle, fee changes and the January earnings reaction have played out against a mixed price backdrop, with short term share price returns weaker but a 1 year total shareholder return of 54.10% pointing to stronger...
